title: astragalus hidalgensis
intro: Astragalus hidalgensis, also known as Hidalgo's milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Astragalus hidalgensis lie in its roots, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus hidalgensis include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Astragalus hidalgensis is traditionally prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is sometimes used in herbal supplements to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
